headline: Anthropic Sends Jolt Through Market for Buying Shares in Hot Pre-IPO Startups
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the moments after Anthropic expanded a ban on popular ways to buy its shares, investor chatrooms around the world lit up. “Are we screwed?” one person wrote in a WhatsApp chat for family offices with several hundred members. Similar questions reverberated more publicly across X, Reddit and Chinese-language social media, as investors worried whether their shares in the artificial intelligence developer — one of the most coveted private companies — had suddenly become worthless.D

headline: 2026 Charles Schwab Challenge Champion’s Prize Revealed as 1982 Schwab Scrambler
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, May 19, 2026--Charles Schwab today unveiled the 2026 Charles Schwab Challenge Champion’s Prize: a fully restored 1982 Schwab Scrambler. As one of the most unique trophies on the PGA TOUR, this iconic vehicle will be awarded to the winner of the PGA TOUR event held at the Colonial Country Club from May 27 – 31, 2026, in Fort Worth, Texas.

headline: ChatGPT Can Now Give Advice By Linking to Clients’ Bank Accounts. Can They Trust It?
summary: OpenAI unveiled a new suite of personal finance tools last week, but how helpful they will be is still up for debate.

headline: Digital Custodian Altruist Takes On Schwab, Fidelity With New RIA Model
summary: The affiliate model itself is nothing new, but it’s novel for a custodian.
